ready.title: Ready-to-Ship Products
ready.body: Keychains, fidgets, and small toys ready to ship from your favorite marketplaces.

generator.title: Silhouette Art Generator
generator.body: Create personalized silhouette art in our app and print it as a custom 3D product.

custom.title: Custom & 3D Print Service
custom.body: Bring your file or your idea — we'll turn it into a high-quality 3D print.

form.title: Join the waitlist
form.subtitle: We'll let you know at launch.
form.success: Thanks! We'll let you know at launch.
form.error_generic: Couldn't sign you up, please try again.

strava_map.title: Your Strava Route in 3D
strava_map.description: Turn your favorite run, ride, or hike into a physical 3D map. Configure it yourself and we'll print it.
strava_map.connect_desc: We'll load your recent activities so you can pick the one to print.
strava_map.pick_hint: Select the activity you'd like to turn into a 3D map.
strava_map.gpx_hint: Click to upload your .gpx file (export from Strava → ⋮ → Export GPX)
strava_map.strava_fetch_failed: Couldn't fetch route from Strava (private activity?). Please upload your GPX file instead.
strava_map.gpx_parse_error: Couldn't read this GPX file. Make sure it's a valid .gpx export from Strava.
strava_map.layers_hint: GPX path is always on. Enable up to 3 more layers.

form.strava_url_hint: Open the activity on Strava and copy the URL from your browser.
form.colors_hint: Tap any swatch to customize. Defaults are pre-filled — change anything you like.
form.success: Order received! We'll WhatsApp you to confirm.
form.success_download_note: Order placed, please send us a WhatsApp message for confirmation.
form.error_invalid_whatsapp: Enter a valid Indonesian phone number (e.g. 0812...).
form.error_invalid_strava_url: Please enter a valid Strava activity URL (starts with https://strava.com/...).
form.error_generic: Something went wrong, please try again.

light_generator.title: Order Light Generator
light_generator.description: Print a lamp with a custom light pattern from your own image.

upload.silhouette_tooltip: The image that becomes the light pattern. Examples: logo, animal silhouette, character. Tip: use high-contrast (black & white) images for best results.
upload.silhouette_hint: PNG, JPG, or WebP · Max 5 MB
upload.floor_tooltip: Image printed on the lamp base — visible from above. Examples: name, special date, pattern. Leave blank for a plain base.
upload.floor_hint: PNG, JPG, or WebP · Max 5 MB
upload.preview_fallback: Preview render unavailable. Use the canvas above as a reference.
upload.stems_desc: Required if the design has disconnected parts
upload.stems_fallback: Auto-detection unavailable. Enable manually if your design has floating disconnected parts.

error.file_too_large: File size must be 5 MB or less.
error.file_invalid_type: File must be PNG, JPG, or WebP.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
